hero.subtitle: High-performance appliances for running large language models locally or in your private infrastructure.
hero.trusted: Trusted by research labs and enterprise teams across Europe

products.title: Choose your performance tier
products.blurb: All appliances come with full remote management, automatic updates, and enterprise-grade support.

edge.name: Edge
edge.description: Compact appliance for small teams and edge inference.

studio.name: Studio
studio.description: Balanced performance for most teams and medium workloads.

forge.name: Forge
forge.description: Maximum throughput for large models and heavy batch workloads.

why.privacyDesc: Your models and data stay on your hardware. No cloud, no third-party access.
why.latencyDesc: Run inference locally with no network round-trips.
why.costsDesc: Fixed hardware + optional services. No surprise cloud bills.
why.controlDesc: You decide updates, access policies, and scaling.

custom.title: Need something custom?
custom.subtitle: We build tailored appliances for specific model sizes, compliance requirements, or integration needs.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.commitmentText: OwnEdge is committed to protecting your personal data.
privacy.dataText: We collect only the data necessary to provide and improve our services.
privacy.useText: Your data is used solely to deliver the services you request and to comply with legal obligations.
privacy.storageText: All data is stored securely within the European Union.
privacy.rightsText: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. Contact us at {email}.
privacy.cookiesText: This website uses essential cookies only.
privacy.changesText: We may update this policy from time to time. The latest version will always be available on this page.
